title: StructureBlock
description: Protect structures! A mod that allows mod, modpack and datapack authors to prevent breaking and placement within structures.
body:
StructureBlock is a mod that will allow you to ensure structures are protected.
By adding structure ID's to a config file, you can decide wether breaking or placement of blocks within a structure is allowed. You can also utilise a wildcard to block actions in multiple structures at once. I.e. the ID for a plains village is `minecraft:village_plains`. However if you want to protect all village variants, you can simply block `minecraft:village_*`.
The Mod only needs to be installed on a Server to work, but you can still install it client-side for singleplayer worlds.
Check out our [getting started](https://github.com/WouterB15/StructureBlock/wiki#getting-started) page for more information. We've planned some additional features, about which you can find out more [here](https://github.com/WouterB15/StructureBlock/wiki/Design-Document).
[![Blunthorn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bd81aa6ae82fa38ca94fa6bcfc55562920de23.png)](https://discord.gg/8z63AhuDZg)
